app_info.subtitle: Extract data from any website
app_info.description: Extract data from any website using thousands of tools from the Apify Store. Apify is the world's largest marketplace of tools for web scraping, data extraction, and web automation.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches the Apify Store catalog and returns matching Actors without creating, modifying, or deleting resources.
justifications.open_world_justification: Queries only the bounded Apify Store catalog and does not interact with arbitrary external services or URLs.
justifications.destructive_justification: Only reads Actor catalog metadata and does not create, modify, or delete data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves Actor metadata such as name, description, input schema, and pricing without modifying resources.
justifications.open_world_justification: Fetches details exclusively from the Apify platform API and does not reach arbitrary external services.
justifications.destructive_justification: Only reads Actor metadata and does not create, modify, or delete data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Starts an Actor run, which creates Apify run, dataset, and key-value store records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Actors can interact with arbitrary external websites and services, such as scraping a user-specified URL.
justifications.destructive_justification: Actors can change Apify platform state and may automate external actions such as form submissions or data writes.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves the status and metadata of an existing Actor run without modifying the run.
justifications.open_world_justification: Queries only the Apify platform API to fetch run details and does not interact with external services.
justifications.destructive_justification: Only reads run metadata and does not create, modify, or delete data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves dataset items with pagination and field selection without modifying the dataset.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads dataset items only through the Apify platform API and does not access arbitrary external services.
justifications.destructive_justification: Only reads stored dataset items and does not create, modify, or delete data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves one key-value store record without modifying the store or record.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads the record only through the Apify platform API and does not access arbitrary external services.
justifications.destructive_justification: Only reads stored record content and does not create, modify, or delete data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Requests cancellation of an existing Actor run, which changes run state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only changes private Apify run state and does not interact with arbitrary external services.
justifications.destructive_justification: Can stop an in-progress run before it finishes, which may discard unfinished work.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches the Apify and Crawlee documentation indexes and returns matching articles without modifying resources.
justifications.open_world_justification: Queries only the Apify and Crawlee documentation knowledge bases and does not access arbitrary external sources.
justifications.destructive_justification: Performs a read-only documentation search and does not create, modify, or delete data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Fetches the content of a specific Apify or Crawlee documentation page without modifying resources.
justifications.open_world_justification: Retrieves content only from allowed Apify and Crawlee documentation domains, not arbitrary external URLs.
justifications.destructive_justification: Only reads documentation content and does not create, modify, or delete data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Starts the Apify RAG Web Browser Actor, creating run storage with fetched web data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Queries Google Search and fetches public web pages selected by the user's query.
justifications.destructive_justification: Runs through the Actor execution path, which can change Apify platform state and may have Actor-dependent external effects.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches the Apify Store catalog and returns widget-ready Actor results without modifying resources.
justifications.open_world_justification: Queries only the bounded Apify Store catalog and the widget connects only to the Apify API.
justifications.destructive_justification: Only reads Actor catalog metadata and does not create, modify, or delete data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves Actor metadata and widget display data without changing the Actor.
justifications.open_world_justification: Fetches details from the Apify platform API and the widget connects only to the Apify API.
justifications.destructive_justification: Only reads Actor metadata and does not create, modify, or delete data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Starts an Actor run and returns widget data for tracking it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Actors can interact with arbitrary external websites and services, while the widget connects only to the Apify API.
justifications.destructive_justification: Actors can change Apify platform state and may automate external actions such as form submissions or data writes.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves Actor run status for widget display without modifying the run.
justifications.open_world_justification: Queries only the Apify platform API for run details and does not interact with external services.
justifications.destructive_justification: Only reads run metadata and does not create, modify, or delete data.

test_cases.user_prompt: Find flights using kiwi mcp server
test_cases.expected_output: Search widget renders with a list of relevant Actors.

test_cases.user_prompt: Tell me about the apify/web-scraper Actor
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the Actor name, description, pricing, and input schema summary.

test_cases.user_prompt: Scrape the homepage of https://example.com using apify/web-scraper
test_cases.expected_output: Actor Run widget shows run progress and completes with results.

test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the results from my last run
test_cases.expected_output: Displays dataset items from the most recent Actor run.
Actor details include detailed explanations of input parameters.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for general web scraping concepts or programming techniques.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: How do I write a Python web scraper using BeautifulSoup to extract product prices?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the user asks for programming guidance, not to run or manage Apify scrapers.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for Apify pricing, billing, account settings, or subscription plans.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: How much does Apify cost per month and what's included in the free tier?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it has no tools to manage account settings, billing, or subscription plans.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for scraping or extracting data from a local file.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Extract all the email addresses from this PDF on my desktop.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because Apify MCP tools operate on cloud-based Actors, public URLs, and online services, not local files.
